zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael de Stourton於大約1185年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親William de Stourton37歲，母親Mrs. William de Stourton34歲。他於大約1220年與Mary Malville de Mauduit在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1243年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael de Stourton于大约1185年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲William de Stourton37岁，母亲Mrs. William de Stourton34岁。他于大约1220年与Mary Malville de Mauduit在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1243年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michael de Stourton was born about 1185, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Stourton, was 37 and his mother, Mrs. William de Stourton, was 34. He married Mary Malville de Mauduit about 1220, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1243, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael de Stourton est né environ 1185, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Stourton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Stourton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Mary Malville de Mauduit environ 1220, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1243, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael de Stourton um 1185 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Stourton 37 und seine Mutter Mrs. William de Stourton 34. Er hat um 1220 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Mary Malville de Mauduit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1243 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael de Stourton è nato il circa 1185 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Stourton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William de Stourton, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Mary Malville de Mauduit circa 1220, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1243, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael de Stourtonが約1185年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父William de Stourtonは37歳，母Mrs. William de Stourtonは34歳であった。約1220年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンでMary Malville de Mauduitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1243年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael de Stourton(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Stourton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William de Stourton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 Mary Malville de Mauduit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1243년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael de Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Stourton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William de Stourton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Malville de Mauduit aproximadamente 1220, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1243, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael de Stourton родился около 1185 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Stourton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Stourton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Malville de Mauduit около 1220 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1243 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael de Stourton nació aproximadamente 1185, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Stourton, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mrs. William de Stourton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Mary Malville de Mauduit aproximadamente 1220, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1243, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
